scripts.build: pnpm --filter @stellar/shared build && pnpm --filter @stellar/server build && pnpm --filter @stellar/web build
scripts.puppeteer:install-chrome: pnpm --filter @stellar/server exec puppeteer browsers install chrome
scripts.package:win: pnpm build && node scripts/prepare-chromium-bundle.mjs && pnpm --filter @stellar/electron run build && pnpm --filter @stellar/electron run package:win
